summary: Phase 3 Marketplace e2e tested. Backend 26/26 pytest pass (health, 16 colonias, 25 properties, all filters & sorts, similares, briefing first+cached, briefing 404). Frontend /marketplace renders 25 cards + 16 colonia chips, filter by Polanco narrows to 2, clear resets to 25, sort price_asc orders correctly, card click navigates to /propiedad/:id. Detail page p007 shows hero with PREVENTA/INMEDIATA tag, meta tiles (3/2/2/124), price, Briefing card (Claude Spanish text, 280 chars, no markdown), WhatsApp share button (wa.me/), description, amenities, 4 score tiles (Vida 92 / Movilidad 88 / Seguridad 76 / Comercio 93), advisor card with Contactar al asesor CTA, MortgageCalculator with 3 working sliders (down/term/rate update monthly $71,085 → $62,199/$68,866/$66,948), MiniMap, 3 similar cards. Favorite persists to localStorage key dmx.favorites=['p007']. Share menu opens with copy/wa/email. /mapa renders mapa-container, layer-toggle-ie + layer-toggle-heat, IE Score legend (red→amber→green) and Mapbox attribution. Tile rendering not fully visible in headless browser — UI chrome is in place per requirement. Landing regression: hero phrase 'Antes de elegir una dirección, lee el mapa.' renders, 6 nav links, no emojis. All i18n strings render in Spanish (no raw keys leak).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py grew to 700 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth.py, marketplace.py, advisor.py, developer.py) for maintainability before next phase
Briefing endpoint correctly caches by (property_id, ISO week) in MongoDB property_briefings collection — clean impl
Filter endpoint /api/properties supports multi-value via Query(None) on colonia/amenity — works as expected
Mortgage calculator uses native HTML range input (type=range) which is accessible and works with keyboard arrows; data-testid coverage is solid

success_rate.frontend: 100% — marketplace, detail, mapa, landing all render and integrate with backend correctly

test_credentials: Not used — public marketplace flow does not require auth
seed_data_creation: None — seed data lives in /app/backend/data_seed.py (16 colonias + 25 properties)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 marketplace fully validated. Run pytest with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported (cd /app && export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_api.py). Mortgage slider is native input[type=range] — drive it via keyboard arrows or by setting value via Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set.call(el,X) then dispatchEvent('input'). Mapbox tiles may not render in headless browsers but UI chrome and toggles work. Briefing endpoint uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations and caches per ISO week in db.property_briefings.
